title: Question about Rebirth and EoE
wikitext:
[]: Question about Rebirth and EoE             Quote Post by fearlubu » Mon May 10, 2010 3:12 pm So I've finished the series but i hear that the Rebirth part in Death and Rebirth is actually the first 1/3 of The End of Evangelion..... so does that mean that EoE contains everything in Rebirth has? or is Rebirth 1/3 of the ending and EoE is the 2/3 of it? and one more thing....if it is the latter (Rebirth containing parts that EoE doesnt, can someone give me a link to Rebirth?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon May 10, 2010 3:19 pm Rebirth is simply the first 30 mins or so of EoE. No use watching it, unless you're a die hard fan and want to see it just for a few minor changes. On this forum linking copyrighted material for download is against the rules, but this is a very special case considering the person/people who uploaded it. So if you do want to watch Rebirth, here is a link http://evacommentary.org/omake/omake.html (I'm assuming linking this even though is copyrighted is fine) Just get a good fansub of EoE, renewal quality and download it. Can't give you a link for that, though. Also try your best not to get spoiled, as in leave this place till you see it, for your own good.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 10, 2010 4:01 pm Sadly, the Rebirth we got was not the real Rebirth, one of several note-worthy reasons why the Manga entertainment release of the Evangelion movies is one of the worst anime DVD releases ever.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 10, 2010 5:17 pm The differences are pretty minor: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Rebirth_vs._Episode_25%27 But it's still fun to see at least once.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Mon May 10, 2010 8:57 pm It's a good thing EoE made the Rebirth version look and sound a lot better...and, at the same time, obsolete... Thank you, EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by fearlubu » Tue May 11, 2010 1:28 pm ahh alright thats cool, thanks for the info guys! but yes...ive been a wee it spoiled already -_-.......... but yeah ive already gotten all the episodes, the director's cut for Ep 20-24(?), death^2 (?), and EoE Renewal so im already good on that lol one day i shall return!!
